name: Green Curry Paste
description: MAESRI GREEN CURRY PASTE 225G
long_description: Maesri Green Curry Paste (Kaeng Kiew Wan) brings the vibrant, fresh flavours of Thailand straight to your kitchen. Made with green chillies, lemongrass, and aromatic Thai herbs, this fragrant, mildly spicy paste is perfect for chicken, pork, seafood, tofu, or fresh vegetables. Packaged in a convenient glass jar, it lets you skip the traditional frying step—just simmer with coconut milk to create a creamy, restaurant-quality green curry in minutes. Ideal for curries, stir-fries, soups, or as a marinade, it keeps fresh for multiple uses and delivers authentic Thai taste effortlessly every time.

name: Msg
description: AJINOMOTO MSG 454G
long_description: Ajinomoto Umami Seasoning 454g is the original monosodium glutamate (MSG) trusted by home cooks and chefs for over 100 years. First developed in Japan in 1909, Ajinomoto enhances the natural umami flavour of food, making dishes taste richer, deeper, and more satisfying. It is produced through a natural fermentation process using sugar and/or starch, resulting in a pure seasoning that brings out the best in soups, stir-fries, meats, vegetables, fried rice, and noodles. Just a small amount adds incredible depth without altering the original taste of your ingredients. Ajinomoto remains a kitchen essential around the world for its quality, consistency, and flavour-enhancing power.

name: Braised Beef Noodles 5 Pack
description: KANG SHI FU BRAISED BEEF NOODLES 5 PACK 530G
long_description:
Savor the depth and warmth of traditional Asian comfort food with the KSF Noodle Soup Braised Beef 5-Pack. Each 106g pack is brimming with bold, hearty flavors inspired by slow-braised beef stew???a rich broth, seasoned with authentic herbs and spices, paired with perfectly chewy noodles.
Designed for families, busy professionals, or anyone who wants a reliable, delicious meal on hand, this convenient 5-pack ensures you're always just minutes away from comfort in a bowl. Just add hot water or cook on the stove for a satisfying, homestyle noodle soup experience.
Whether you're stocking your pantry or feeding a hungry crowd, these noodles deliver restaurant-quality flavor at a fraction of the time and cost. With high-quality ingredients and consistent taste, KSF makes it easy to enjoy a warm, fulfilling meal whenever you need it. A staple for noodle lovers, this 5-pack is your ticket to bold flavor and everyday convenience.
ingredients: NOODLES- Wheat Flour, Palm Oil (contains Antioxidant (307)), Tapioca Starch, Thickeners (1420, 415, 401, 466, 414), Salt, Wheat Gluten, Acidity Regulators (501, 500, 452, 339, 451, 450), Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Isolated Soy Protein, Colours (100, 101), Emulsifier (471), Whole Egg Powder. name: Coconut Milk
description: COLES COCONUT MILK 400ML
long_description:
A robust but smooth profile, our Coles Coconut Milk has made its way from the coconut palms of Thailand. Our Thailand suppliers are experts in how to press shredded coconut meat and blend it for a velvety, flavoursome cooking ingredient.


With no artificial colours or flavours, we've kept our coco milk simple - great for curries, drinks, desserts and sauces.


Your most versatile friend in the pantry, our Coles Coconut Milk is a great substitute for dairy. You can try it as a base for your morning berry and banana protein smoothies, or cooked through a number of traditional Indian and Thai cuisines.


Our Coles Coconut Milk has even been known to venture into the odd coffee cup, offering a deliciously sweet flavour instead of adding sugar.


A liquid pouring texture, sometimes you will find it can set in the corners in colder weather. Still, it is a perfectly pliable and smooth texture for any cooking or baking needs.

Turn up the heat with Orion Turtle Chips Flaming Mala, the ultimate snack for spice lovers! Infused with bold mala seasoning, these crispy four-layer chips deliver a punch of numbing heat and savoury spice in every crunchy bite. It is fiery, fun, and fiercely addictive.

  • Spicy Szechuan mala seasoning
  • Bold flavour with a real spicy kick
